title: Serenity Alpha
description: A faithful alpha recreation in modern minecraft, using imported and hand drawn textures.
body:
Welcome to serenity, my starting point of a band new alpha styled texture pack for minecraft! This pack is currently in early development, as it as just been started on Jan 4th, '26.

In this texture pack you will find early alpha assets imported, as well as new hand drawn assets to help fit the classic style! Multiple sounds have been changed to their alpha counterparts, and the new music has been removed from the game. The title screen also has music disabled, consistent with early alpha versions. The GUI has been given a light coat of paint - with hunger being replaced with pork chops, and a more alpha styled EXP bar.

Certain blocks have been renamed to earlier counterparts. For example: Crafting Table -> Workbench, Gunpowder -> Sulphur, Sugar Cane -> Reeds, Netherrack -> Bloodstone, etc. All foliage has been given it's old colour palette of neon green, with deep blue water. The new pale and cherry trees have had classical overhauls, Reeds and vines have had their biome tinting removed, and the rose is back! 

Stained glass has been old-ified, likewise with the old wool textures / colours returning. The pack is currently in what I would consider a playable state, meaning that enough common blocks have been updated as to not make the experience jarring. With that in mind, this pack is still VERY EARLY in development!
